claimText: Under UNSW's 'No Assistance' level, students are not permitted to use any generative AI tools, software, or service to search for or generate information or answers.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: This assessment is designed for you to complete without the use of any generative AI.  You are not permitted to use any generative AI tools, software or service to search for or generate information or answers.

citation.citationTitle: Using AI in university | Current Students – UNSW Sydney
